# What

Describe the framework, template, data, or documentation change.

# Why

Explain which AI engineering problem this solves.

# Pillar

- [ ] Spec
- [ ] Verify
- [ ] Memory
- [ ] Loop
- [ ] Metrics / Adoption

# Verification

- [ ] Links and public claims checked
- [ ] Example data marked synthetic or sourced
- [ ] Templates remain tool-neutral
- [ ] README or related docs updated
- [ ] Loop changes include exit conditions, retry budget, and escalation path

# Risks

List limitations, assumptions, or adoption risks.
